programs.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programs.desc: Rat wants to throw out some old clothes. But his rubbish bin is full so he hides them behind some rocks on the beach. The Bananas find them while on beach patrol and Rat convinces them they were left by mysterious night visitors.

programs.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programs.desc: The Teddies are putting on a play so Lulu enlists the Bananas to help backstage. The rehearsal goes well but things don't go so smoothly on opening night. Rat thinks it's deliberate and congratulates the Teddies on their brilliant play.

programs.title: Bing MAIN
programs.desc: Pando has an earworm, and Bing isn't impressed. When Pando can't resist  saying its name, Bingly Bangly, Bing knocks Pando's tower over and wants him to go home. But then Flop helps to fix everything.

programs.title: Fizzy And Suds
programs.desc: Fizzy and Suds visit an observatory to explore our planets! They see how planets orbit the Sun, what they're made of, and there's a special trip to Mars!

programs.title: Peppa Pig:
programs.desc: Peppa and her friends are playing hide and seek, but it is Freddy Fox with his super smelling nose who is the best at playing that game.

programs.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programs.desc: Captain Feathersword's hat and sword keep falling to the ground, they need your help, shout out when the hat or sword falls! The Wiggles try different dance moves to help Captain, will one of them work?
